bullets: Upfront pricing with no hidden fees

bullets: Fully stocked trucks for fast fixes

servicesPage.intro: From simple repairs to complex installations, Electrics Contractor Pros delivers expert electrical services tailored to your needs. Our licensed electricians serve Dallas and surrounding areas with professionalism and care.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable repairs for all electrical issues.
services.longDescription: Our electricians diagnose and fix electrical problems quickly, from flickering lights to faulty outlets. We use advanced tools to identify issues and provide lasting solutions.
benefits: Upfront pricing before any work begins

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect and test to pinpoint the issue.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We fix the problem using quality parts and methods.

process.title: Testing
process.description: We verify everything works safely and correctly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and typically arrive within 60 minutes.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: No, we provide free estimates with no obligation.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Modernize your electrical system for safety and capacity.
services.longDescription: Upgrade your outdated electrical panel to handle modern power demands. We install code-compliant panels that improve safety and prevent overloads.
benefits: Increased capacity for appliances and electronics
Potential energy savings and home value boost

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel and power needs.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We replace the panel with a high-quality unit.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We test the system and ensure code compliance.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: If you have frequent breaker trips, use many high-power devices, or have an old fuse box, an upgrade is recommended.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most upgrades are completed in one day.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, energy-efficient lighting for any space.
services.longDescription: Transform your home or business with custom lighting solutions. We install indoor and outdoor fixtures, recessed lighting, smart controls, and more.
benefits: Energy-efficient LED options to save money
Custom designs to match your style
Professionally installed for safety and longevity

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision and assess the space.

process.title: Design
process.description: We create a lighting plan tailored to your needs.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install fixtures and test for optimal performance.

faqs.question: Can you install smart lighting systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install and set up smart lighting with voice control, dimming, and scheduling.

faqs.question: Do you offer outdoor lighting for security?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, we provide motion-sensor and landscape lighting to enhance security.

services.title: Wiring & Rewiring Services
services.shortDescription: Safe, code-compliant wiring for new builds and renovations.
services.longDescription: Whether building new or remodeling, our rewiring services ensure your electrical system is safe, efficient, and up to code. We handle everything from rough-in to finish.

process.title: Planning
process.description: We design the wiring layout based on your needs.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We run cables, install outlets, and connect systems.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We test all circuits and ensure everything works.

faqs.question: Do I need to rewire my old home?
faqs.answer: If your home has aluminum wiring, knob-and-tube, or frequent issues, rewiring is recommended for safety.

faqs.question: Will rewiring disrupt my daily life?
faqs.answer: We work efficiently to minimize downtime, often completing projects room by room.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Electricians
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services with a focus on customer satisfaction and craftsmanship.
story: Founded in 2009, Electrics Contractor Pros started as a small family operation serving Dallas neighborhoods. Our founder, a master electrician, saw a need for honest, high-quality electrical work in a market full of inconsistent contractors. We built our reputation one job at a time, emphasizing transparency and attention to detail.

Today, we serve hundreds of residential and commercial clients across Dallas. Our team continues to grow, but our values remain the same: treat every home like our own, communicate clearly, and never cut corners. We're proud to be a locally owned business that Dallas trusts.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, with honest pricing and reliable service.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: Every job follows strict safety standards to protect you and our team.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in clean, precise work that stands the test of time.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local businesses and give back to the Dallas community.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out our form for a free estimate.
